name: Cup Tamales with Vera Cruz Flavors
recipeIngredient: Leftover Cooked Pork, Beef - and/or Chicken (diced)
2 tablespoons Salsa, marinade from canned chipotles en adobo
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, combine hominy, lard or vegetable shortening, chile powder, and salt. Puree until smooth.
2. Use about two-thirds of the mixture to line individual greased ramekins or one large casserole dish.
3. Combine meats (pork, beef, and/or chicken), salsa, marinade from chipotle sauce, tomato, cilantro, raisins, and chopped olives in a bowl. Season with cinnamon and cumin as desired.
4. Spoon the meat mixture into the ramekins or casserole dish.
5. Top each ramekin or casserole with the remaining hominy mixture.
6. Cover each ramekin or the casserole with foil.
7. Place in a water-filled pan and bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
